figures.caption: Table 1: LongMemEval-S accuracy by question type (N=500). MEMTIER BM25 only uses raw episodic retrieval; MEMTIER + semantic adds DeepSeek-V4-Flash fact pre-population. Taxonomy follows Wu et al. (2025).
Table 2: Ablation study on LongMemEval-S (N=500). Full system: Acc=0.382, F1=0.412 (k = 4, 300 tokens). Each row removes or modifies one component. ∆Acc relative to full system.

Figure 1: The MEMTIER multi-agent retrieval pipeline. Episodic logs are agent-private; distilled semantic facts are project-shared, enabling cross-agent knowledge transfer while preventing context contamination.
